expectations.evidence: answer.md lists bg-slate-800, bg-slate-700, bg-slate-700/80, bg-gray-800/60. example-slide.md uses bg-slate-700, bg-slate-800, bg-slate-900, bg-white/5, bg-blue-900/30.
answer.md documents rounded-lg, rounded-xl, rounded-2xl and shadow-lg, shadow-xl, shadow-2xl. example-slide.md uses rounded-xl, rounded-2xl, rounded-lg with shadow-lg, shadow-xl, shadow-2xl.
answer.md section 3 shows v-click on individual card divs and v-click with numbered order (v-click='1', v-click='2'). example-slide.md applies v-click to every individual card across all 7 patterns.
example-slide.md has frontmatter (theme: default, title, colorSchema: dark), --- slide separators, and 7 complete copy-pasteable slide patterns.

answer.md mentions dark backgrounds and recommends 'class: bg-slate-900' or activating dark mode in section 7. example-slide.md uses colorSchema: dark in frontmatter and class: bg-slate-900 on each slide. However, does not mention dark: prefix for dual-mode support.
answer.md lists p-4, p-6, p-8, gap-4, gap-6, space-y-4. example-slide.md uses p-5, p-6, p-8, gap-4, gap-6, gap-8, space-y-4, mt-6, mt-8.
